parameters.text:
=You are an expert at extracting structured data from receipts and invoices.

Receipt content:
{{ $json.pages[0].markdown }}

Extract EVERY piece of information from this receipt and return it as a single flat or nested JSON object. Always include these base fields if present:
- vendor (string): store, restaurant, or company name
- date (string): purchase date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- total (number): final total paid
- subtotal (number): amount before tax
- tax (number): tax amount
- tip (number): tip amount
- payment_method (string)
- category (string): Food, Gas, Groceries, Office Supplies, Travel, Utilities, Medical, Entertainment, etc.
- receipt_number (string)
- address (string)
- phone (string)

ADDITIONALLY, extract ALL type-specific fields you find. Examples:

For GAS receipts also include:
- price_per_gallon (number)
- gallons (number)
- fuel_grade (string: Regular/Plus/Premium/Diesel)
- odometer (number, if shown)
- pump_number (string, if shown)

For RESTAURANT/FOOD receipts also include:
- line_items: array of objects with name, qty, unit_price, total_price for each item
- server (string, if shown)
- table_number (string, if shown)

For GROCERY receipts also include:
- line_items: array of objects with name, qty, unit_price, total_price for each item
- savings (number, total discounts/coupons if shown)

For HOTEL receipts also include:
- check_in (string, YYYY-MM-DD)
- check_out (string, YYYY-MM-DD)
- nights (number)
- room_rate (number per night)
- room_number (string)

For SERVICES/INVOICES also include:
- invoice_number (string)
- due_date (string, YYYY-MM-DD)
- billed_to (string)
- line_items: array of objects with description, qty, unit_price, total_price

For any other fields visible on the receipt that don't fit the above, include them with a sensible snake_case key name.

Rules:
- Omit any field that is not present on the receipt — never include null or empty values
- Return ONLY a raw JSON object, no markdown, no explanation, no code blocks
- Numbers should be actual numbers, not strings
